zh.lifeSummary: 當Guigues d'Albon於0970年6月9日出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊巴斯時，他的父親Guigues d'Albon21歲，母親Fredeburga d' vienne43歲。他於0989年與Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion在法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆阿爾邦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1009年6月9日在法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆阿爾邦享年39歲。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Staffordshire): nickname or habitational name from Norman French Malbanc, which may be from Old French mal banc ‘bad bench’, but if so the reason for the use of this expression as a surname is unknown. Possibly it derives from a lost placename, in which banc may mean ‘steep crag’. The second part of the name, -banc, survives in Maybank , but medieval forms in -ban(e), -bon(e), or -bun are also common and are sometimes later re-interpreted as -born and -bourne, leading to confusion with Melbourne .

variants.name: Mabon
meanings: Scottish: from a Brittonic personal name Mabon or Maban, apparently derivatives of Maponos, the name of an ancient Celtic god.
Possibly also English (of Norman origin): variant of Malbon with loss of -l-.
In some cases possibly also Breton: ultimately of the same origin as the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Maybank
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Malbon  .

en.lifeSummary: When Guigues d'Albon was born on 9 June 0970, in Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guigues d'Albon, was 21 and his mother, Fredeburga d' vienne, was 43. He married Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion in 0989, in Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 June 1009, in Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guigues d'Albon est né le 9 juin 0970, à Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues d'Albon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Fredeburga d' vienne, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion en 0989, à Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1009, à Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guigues d'Albon am 9. Juni 0970 in Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guigues d'Albon 21 und seine Mutter Fredeburga d' vienne 43. Er hat 0989 in Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1009 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues d'Albon è nato il il 9 giugno 0970 nel Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guigues d'Albon, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Fredeburga d' vienne, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion nel 0989, nel Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 giugno 1009, nel Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guigues d'Albonが0970年6月9日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイヴィオンスで生まれた時，父Guigues d'Albonは21歳，母Fredeburga d' vienneは43歳であった。0989年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスドルoメアルボンでGotelena De Clerieux Of Silvionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1009年6月9日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスドルoメアルボンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guigues d'Albon(이)가 0970년 6월 9일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 비오스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guigues d'Albon(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Fredeburga d' vienne(은)는 43세였다. 그는 0989년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 드o 알본에서 Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1009년 6월 9일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 드o 알본에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.9 June 970–9 June 1009: 9 de junho de 0970–9 de junho de 1009
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues d'Albon nasceu em 9 de junho de 0970, em Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues d'Albon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Fredeburga d' vienne, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion em 0989, em Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1009, em Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, França, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guigues d'Albon родился 9 июня 0970 г. в местности вионс, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guigues d'Albon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Fredeburga d' vienne, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion в 0989 г. в местности албон, дрoм, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 июня 1009 г. в местности албон, дрoм, рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

es.9 June 970–9 June 1009: 9 de junio de 0970–9 de junio de 1009
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guigues d'Albon nació el 9 de junio de 0970, en Vions, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues d'Albon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Fredeburga d' vienne, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion en 0989, en Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de junio de 1009, en Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
